ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., yes, no, occasional) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient (e.g., non-drinker, light, moderate, heavy) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease or other relevant conditions */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "chest_pain_type" TEXT /* Type of chest pain (1: typical angina, 2: atypical angina, 3: non-anginal pain, 4: asymptomatic) */,
  "resting_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure in mm Hg */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Serum cholesterol in mg/dl */,
  "fasting_blood_sugar" TEXT /* Fasting blood sugar (1: >120 mg/dl, 0: <=120 mg/dl) */,
  "resting_ecg" TEXT /* Resting electrocardiographic results (0: normal, 1: having ST-T wave abnormality, 2: showing probable or definite left ventricular hypertrophy) */,
  "max_heart_rate" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exercise_induced_angina" TEXT /* Exercise-induced angina (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "st_depression" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "st_slope" TEXT /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment (1: upsloping, 2: flat, 3: downsloping) */,
  "num_major_vessels" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thalassemia" TEXT /* Thalassemia (3: normal, 6: fixed defect, 7: reversible defect) */,
  "heart_disease" TEXT /* Diagnosis of heart disease (0: no disease, 1: disease present) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the medical record was created */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time the medical record was created */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the medical record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the record was created */,
  "clinical_notes" TEXT /* Clinical notes or observations made during the examination */,
  "referring_doctor" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who referred the patient */,
  "referral_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_referring_doctor FOREIGN KEY ("referring_doctor") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment is for */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor the appointment is with */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the appointment is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., consultation, follow-up) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the appointment */,
  "appointment_location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment (e.g., hospital, clinic) */,
  "appointment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., if canceled, the reason for cancellation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the doctor is affiliated with */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the doctor has */,
  "specialization_area" TEXT /* Specific area of specialization (e.g., cardiology, general practice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical record the test result belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., cholesterol, blood pressure, ECG) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the test result */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who conducted the test */,
  "test_normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the test result */,
  "test_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., normal, abnormal, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_conducted_by") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES medical_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the treatment plan is for */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the treatment plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment plan (e.g., medication, lifestyle changes) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan ends */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up appointment */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "treatment_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the treatment plan (e.g., highly effective, moderately effective, not effective) */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Side effects observed during the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, twice a week) */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medication is prescribed to */,
  "prescription_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the medication is prescribed (e.g., 30 days, 60 days) */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the prescription */,
  "prescription_status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., active, expired, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., cardiology, administration) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the record was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the record (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the record was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of health metric (e.g., blood pressure, cholesterol, heart rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional information about the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the health metric (e.g., hospital, clinic, home monitoring) */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the health metric (e.g., normal, abnormal, pending) */,
  "metric_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the health metric over time (e.g., improving, worsening, stable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the history belongs to */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of medical history (e.g., previous illnesses, surgeries, allergies) */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Details of the medical history */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date the history was recorded */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who recorded the history */,
  "history_source" TEXT /* Source of the medical history (e.g., patient, family member, previous doctor) */,
  "history_status" TEXT /* Status of the medical history (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "history_follow_up" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up related to the medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
